thesis: Leading 3D content creation platform with ~70% mobile game market share, recovering from the 2023 'Runtime Fee' controversy that damaged developer trust. New CEO focused on strategic portfolio cleanup and profitable growth. $2.06B cash provides 5+ years of runway and net debt has improved from $691M to $180M; free cash flow turned positive in recent quarters. Persistent GAAP losses (~$400M/yr), heavy stock-based compensation (~5% annual dilution), and intense competition from Unreal Engine keep the risk profile elevated. HOLD with strict risk management given heavy portfolio concentration.

drivers: Developer trust recovery drives re-rating after pricing model stabilization
Unity Muse / Sentis AI tools lower development barriers and expand TAM
Meta VR multi-year partnership and Apple Vision Pro primary-platform position pay off in a new spatial computing content cycle
Industrial digital twins expand Unity beyond gaming into automotive and manufacturing
Revenue growth accelerates to ~18% with 25% EBITDA margins

base_case.assumptions: Revenue grows ~12% with EBITDA margins expanding toward 20%; pricing model stays stable and developer relations continue to normalize; FCF stays positive but GAAP profitability remains elusive near term; stock re-rates modestly on execution under new leadership.

risks: Unreal Engine keeps taking share, especially in high-end and AAA gaming
Developer trust never fully recovers from the pricing controversy
Mobile gaming market stagnates, hurting Grow Solutions revenue
Goodwill impairment ($3.17B, 46% of assets) forces write-downs
Revenue growth stalls at 0-5% and cash burn resumes

catalysts.event: Earnings — revenue trajectory, margin progress, and FCF durability
Pricing model stabilization and developer relations recovery
Unity Muse / Sentis AI tooling adoption and potential pricing power
Meta VR partnership extension and Apple Vision Pro spatial computing content cycle
Industrial digital twins expansion into automotive and manufacturing

key_risks: Developer exodus risk — trust damaged by 2023 Runtime Fee controversy, competitive pressure from Unreal and Godot
Epic's Unreal Engine 5 offers photorealistic graphics and is free below $1M revenue
Execution risk under new leadership after multiple strategy pivots
Goodwill impairment risk: $3.17B goodwill, negative tangible book value (-$579M)
Heavy stock-based compensation dilutes shareholders ~5% annually
